name: Light & Flaky Pie Crust Low-Fat
recipeIngredient: 1 cup plus 2 tablespoons whole-wheat pastry flour or unbleached all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and pinch of salt.
2. Add the safflower oil and apple cider vinegar to the flour mixture. Stir until the dough comes together.
3. Gradually add ice water, one tablespoon at a time, mixing with a fork or your hands until the dough is crumbly but holds together when squeezed.
4. Turn off heat (if using an oven).
5. Divide the dough in half and shape each portion into a disk. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before using.
